bounded_deviations.description: The package root uses Composer package-repository source references while direct requirements retain the dev-main constraint.
bounded_deviations.guard: composer.lock and the exact-vendor bootstrap pin the eleven accepted revisions for package verification; Root integration must preserve equivalent exact revisions.

bounded_deviations.description: Real MySQL verification requires an explicitly selected local ignored file outside committed evidence.
bounded_deviations.guard: The test rejects tracked, non-ignored, non-local-host or group/world-readable carriers and never records credential values.

bounded_deviations.description: The package exposes one anonymous sessionless JSON read route rather than an HTML frontend or public write API.
bounded_deviations.guard: Private, draft, corrupt and infrastructure-failed projections return the same not-public response.

bounded_deviations.description: The Search source registry retains a provider whose dependencies are scoped.
bounded_deviations.guard: Resolve with a Search owner factory or lazy-provider contract before any long-running-runtime or production-readiness claim.
